title: The Night Guard
description: This Horror Mod Adds A Night Guard That Goes Around At Night, But Something Is Wrong With Him
body:
This new horror mod adds a new monster but still human that is called "The Night Watcher" that roams around at night with wolves to help him, but something is off about him and his dogs can you figure out what's wrong with him? Or you will never find out the truth about his craziness... this mod also adds lots of structures to the mod for you to explore and figure out the night guard's craziness! And you can talk to him in chat, it can be silly talk or reveal parts of the lore about him! 

THIS IS THE TESTING VERSION, SO EVERYTHING IN THE MOD IS NOT FINAL!
